name: Sesame Seed Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small heavy skillet, stir sesame seeds over medium-high heat until golden. Stir frequently to ensure even toasting and prevent burning.
2. Set the toasted sesame seeds aside once they reach the desired color.
3. In a small container with a tight-fitting lid, combine the oil, water, vinegar, soy sauce, pectin, and salt.
4. Seal the container tightly and shake vigorously for 15 seconds to mix all ingredients thoroughly.
5. Add the toasted sesame seeds and a dash of paprika to the mixture. Shake again to ensure everything is well combined.
6. Refrigerate the dressing until ready to serve, up to 24 hours. Give it a quick shake before using.
This recipe makes about 1/2 cup of dressing.
